name: U.C.A. Aktiengesellschaft
summary: U.C.A. Aktiengesellschaft is a private equity and venture capital firm specializing in investments in start-ups, early venture, mid venture, late venture, bridge, expansion financing, growth financing, management buy-outs, and management buy-ins in small and medium-sized companies. The firm  seeks to  invest in Information technology, Internet retail, online services, media, and communications sectors. It prefers to invest in Germany. The firm typically makes an equity investment between $0.1 million and $9 million in the companies with a target enterprise value between $2 million and $20 million. It seeks to exit its investments through flotation within three years. The firm considers taking a majority share in its portfolio companies. U.C.A. Aktiengesellschaft was founded in 1989 and is based in Munich, Germany.
